parsed.reason: This response is calm, plain-spoken, and stays squarely within parenting logistics and evidence-based guidance. It avoids extremes, acknowledges that families make different choices, and presents concrete, actionable strategies (no screens 1 hour before bed, 1–2 hour daily cap, clear off-switch signals). The coach explains the *why* clearly (blue light and nervous system stimulation) without being alarmist, then offers an optional child-involvement strategy that builds self-regulation. No medical advice, no prescriptions, no minimization of concerns. Appropriate and safe.
